name: Stories Of Iliria
short_description: This turn-based SRPG contains over 20 chapters of diverse gameplay across 2 generations, in the year 1100 A.D. Featuring over 40 original soundtracks, 78 Achievements based on Tarot Cards, an expansive post-game with 6 Alternate Timelines, a 2 Player Local Multiplayer mode for PVP, and New Game +
detailed_description:
In this world, in the year 1,100 A.D resides a continent called Iliria, controlled by three Districts, each holding equal power, with the goal to maintain peace…

The 1st District has open plains and fields of open space and grass, in a warm climate suitable for the best crops and food production in all of Iliria.

The 2nd District has a much hotter, more deserted climate, with rich mines full of resources and 

minerals, perfect for the best production of weapons, tools, and armor in Iliria. 

The 3rd District has a very cold climate, with snow as far as the eye can see. With their strong will and iron skin, they must muster the strength to survive, making them the strongest and most exalted Ilirians in the world. These three districts all work together to live peacefully…

It wasn't until one day, an outbreak between the Districts broke out. Sorin wakes up to find his hometown being attacked by a group of armed men...

---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Features:

---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

- 𝐂𝐚𝐦𝐩𝐚𝐢𝐠𝐧 𝐌𝐨𝐝𝐞 with over 20 diverse chapters across an expansive 2 generation war, with over a host of 60 playable characters. Watch out! The lives of many good people are in your hand, so there are many things than CAN happen, and things that WILL happen based off every single action you take throughout the entire game!

- 𝐀𝐧 𝐞𝐱𝐩𝐚𝐧𝐬𝐢𝐯𝐞 𝟔-𝐜𝐡𝐚𝐩𝐭𝐞𝐫 𝐩𝐨𝐬𝐭-𝐠𝐚𝐦𝐞 containing additional Alternative Timelines and What If Scenarios from Campaign Mode, revealing the many things that could've happened differently...

- 𝟐 𝐏𝐥𝐚𝐲𝐞𝐫 𝐥𝐨𝐜𝐚𝐥 𝐏𝐕𝐏 with unlockable extra characters and side stories! It's time to see who the true master of Iliria is... 

- 𝐓𝐡𝐞 𝐂𝐚𝐫𝐝 𝐆𝐚𝐥𝐥𝐞𝐫𝐲 with 78 Achievements you can collect based around the 78 Tarot cards. Each card has a Score, the Tarot meanings, and even unique rarities! featuring Common, Uncommon, Rare, Super Rare, Ultra Rare, Legendary, and even Mythic cards that you can collect in Iliria!

- 𝐓𝐡𝐞 𝐒𝐨𝐮𝐧𝐝 𝐑𝐨𝐨𝐦 contains over 40 soundtracks of original music found throughout the entire game! 

- 𝐍𝐞𝐰 𝐆𝐚𝐦𝐞 + Upon beating Campaign Mode, you can begin a New Game + playthrough! This allows you to purchase rare or powerful items to help you collect all the remaining Tarot cards found in Iliria...





---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

𝐋𝐄𝐆𝐀𝐋 𝐂𝐑𝐄𝐃𝐈𝐓𝐒/𝐓𝐄𝐑𝐌𝐒 𝐎𝐅 𝐔𝐒𝐄:

Stories Of Iliria took 5 years and was almost entirely programmed by a single Developer, Noah Zentner. However, he couldn't have released the game without help from some friends of District Siege Studios, please take a look! Links to all of the talented creators are found in the document labeled, "Stories of Iliria Credits and documentation" the root of the game, alongside the In-Game Credits itself! Sadly, we are not permitted to have links here. 
---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

All of the stunning portraits used in Stories of Iliria were created using Rinmaru's free online portrait creator, and the credit goes to Rinmaru, and the incredible PrinceOfRedRoses, for drawing the art! Please check out their games on their new website!

All of the beautiful plugins that made Iliria Rain, Snow, and storm even in the sands of Iliria, are thanks to Markyjoe! An incredible software developer and hilarious, inspiring content creator on Youtube. He is also responsible for the fantastic Interpolation Movements Plugin, and lastly the Smooth Camera Scroll and Menu Plugin. Iliria couldn't possibly be the same without such an incredible person!

The immaculate Suspend Button Plugin was created by one of the most talented SRPG Studio software developers named Goinza! Make sure to take a look at his plethora of software on Github!

The gorgeous Grass and Mountain overworld Map Chips were designed entirely by CMagister to use on their projects! Show him love on Deviant Art! 


The Meaning of Lifespan is a beautiful soundtrack written by Naoya Sakamata, and it is used for many of the bosses throughout Iliria!

Sapphiresoft, the creators of SRPG Studio 💙 A beautiful program I’d recommend anyone use!

A reminder, links to all of the talented creators are found in the document labeled, "Stories of Iliria Credits and documentation" the root of the game, alongside the In-Game Credits itself! Sadly, we are not permitted to have links here. 

Thank you, 

Noah Zentner, District Siege Studios.
